diagnostics.template: Variable '%s' declared as %s but assigned %s at line %d
diagnostics.description: A variable is being assigned a value that doesn't match its declared type

examples.output: Variable 'count' declared as Int but assigned Str at line 1

diagnostics.template: Variable '%s' used before declaration at line %d
diagnostics.description: A variable is being used without being declared first

examples.output: Variable 'undeclared' used before declaration at line 1

diagnostics.template: Variable '%s' declared but never used at line %d
diagnostics.description: A variable is declared but never referenced in the code

examples.output: Variable 'unused' declared but never used at line 1

diagnostics.template: Variable '%s' shadows outer scope variable declared at line %d
diagnostics.description: A variable declaration hides a variable with the same name from an outer scope

examples.output: Variable 'name' shadows outer scope variable declared at line 1

diagnostics.description: The type expression contains invalid syntax

examples.output: Invalid type expression 'Int|' at line 1: incomplete union type

diagnostics.template: Deprecated syntax '%s' at line %d, use '%s' instead
diagnostics.description: Code uses deprecated syntax that should be updated

examples.output: Deprecated syntax 'my $var : Int' at line 1, use 'my Int $var' instead

diagnostics.template: Consider using %s instead of %s for better performance at line %d
diagnostics.description: Suggests performance improvements for common patterns

examples.output: Consider using ArrayRef[Int] instead of range for better performance at line 1
